name: nexus-ai-evaluation-dataset
description: Domain-relevant questions for evaluating RAG pipeline quality on company knowledge base scenarios

questions.question: What is the company's remote work policy?
questions.expectedAnswer: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Core collaboration hours are 10am–3pm EST.

questions.question: How do I request time off?
questions.expectedAnswer: Submit a request through the HR portal at least 5 business days in advance. Manager approval is required.

questions.question: What health insurance plans are available?
questions.expectedAnswer: Three tiers are offered: Basic (HMO), Standard (PPO), and Premium (PPO with dental/vision). Enrollment is during onboarding or open season.

questions.question: What is the 401k match percentage?
questions.expectedAnswer: The company matches 100% of contributions up to 4% of salary. Match vests immediately.

questions.question: How many weeks of paid parental leave are provided?
questions.expectedAnswer: 12 weeks of fully paid parental leave for primary caregivers and 4 weeks for secondary caregivers.

questions.question: What is the code review process?
questions.expectedAnswer: All code requires at least one approving review from a team member before merging. Security-sensitive changes require two approvals.

questions.question: Which branch naming convention should I use?
questions.expectedAnswer: Use feature/TICKET-123-short-description for features, bugfix/TICKET-123-description for bugs, and hotfix/description for production fixes.

questions.question: What is the deployment schedule?
questions.expectedAnswer: Production deployments occur on Tuesdays and Thursdays at 2pm EST. Emergency hotfixes may be deployed outside this window with VP approval.

questions.question: How do I report a security incident?
questions.expectedAnswer: Email security@company.com immediately. Include timestamp, affected systems, and observed behavior. Do not discuss in public channels.

questions.question: What are the password requirements?
questions.expectedAnswer: Minimum 14 characters with at least one uppercase, one lowercase, one number, and one special character. Must be changed every 90 days.

questions.question: Is multi-factor authentication required?
questions.expectedAnswer: Yes, MFA is mandatory for all company systems including email, VPN, and cloud infrastructure.

questions.question: What is the acceptable use policy for company devices?
questions.expectedAnswer: Company devices are for business use only. Personal use is permitted for incidental activities. No installation of unauthorized software.

questions.question: How do I access the staging environment?
questions.expectedAnswer: Request access via the DevOps portal. Staging credentials are rotated weekly and distributed through 1Password.

questions.question: What is the escalation procedure for P0 incidents?
questions.expectedAnswer: Page the on-call engineer via PagerDuty. If no response in 5 minutes, escalate to engineering manager, then VP of Engineering.

questions.question: How often are penetration tests performed?
questions.expectedAnswer: External penetration tests are conducted annually. Internal vulnerability scans run monthly. Results are shared with the security team.

questions.question: What is the travel reimbursement policy?
questions.expectedAnswer: Coach airfare, standard hotel rooms, and reasonable meals are reimbursable. Expenses over $500 require pre-approval. Submit receipts within 30 days.

questions.question: How do I order new hardware?
questions.expectedAnswer: Submit a request through the IT portal. Standard equipment ships within 5 business days. Custom requests require manager approval.

questions.question: What programming languages are used in the backend?
questions.expectedAnswer: The backend is primarily written in TypeScript using NestJS. Python is used for data science and ML workloads.

questions.question: What is the SLA for customer support?
questions.expectedAnswer: Enterprise customers receive responses within 2 hours. Standard customers within 24 hours. Critical issues are addressed within 1 hour.

questions.question: How do I update the public API documentation?
questions.expectedAnswer: API docs are auto-generated from OpenAPI specs. Update the NestJS DTOs and decorators, then run npm run docs:generate. Changes deploy on merge to main.

questions.question: What is the data retention policy?
questions.expectedAnswer: Customer data is retained for 7 years after account closure. Logs are retained for 2 years. Backups are kept for 90 days.

questions.question: How do I handle a GDPR data deletion request?
questions.expectedAnswer: Forward the request to privacy@company.com within 24 hours. The legal team will verify identity and initiate deletion within 30 days.

questions.question: What are the core company values?
questions.expectedAnswer: Transparency, Customer Obsession, Continuous Learning, and Inclusive Collaboration.

questions.question: How is performance evaluated?
questions.expectedAnswer: Quarterly 360-degree reviews with self-assessment, peer feedback, and manager evaluation. Goals are set using OKRs.

questions.question: What is the onboarding process for new engineers?
questions.expectedAnswer: Week 1: environment setup and codebase walkthrough. Week 2: first ticket with mentor pairing. Week 3-4: independent contributions with code reviews.
